alignment: GNSS aligned into odom/world frame; odom positions rebased; hidden /ground_truth/odom copied from original odom before deletion
filtering: enable_output_motion_smoothing=true; second-order damped output smoother; natural_freq=3.0Hz; damping_ratio=1.0; max_accel=50.0; max_correction_speed=20.0

odom_visible_during_dropout.note: /mavros/odometry/out is intentionally removed from 8-32s; hidden odom is the reference, so no visible odom estimate exists in the dropout window.
